title: Ain't I a Woman?
description: A Wikisource source card for Sojourner Truth's speech tradition and rights-focused reading.

pages.text: Ain't I a Woman? is useful for studying abolition, women's rights, speech transmission, audience, and rhetorical power.
Use this source with context about versions, transcription, dialect representation, and how historical speeches reach modern readers.
Wikisource hosts public-domain and freely licensed texts. Check the linked work page for its specific license and source notes before assigning or mirroring.
